title: Broken Tools
description: A resource pack that makes your tool's texture change as it loses durability.
body:
A resource pack that makes your tool's texture change as it loses durability. This is a 16x16 pack that includes most tools. When your tools get below 10% they will flash white, and at 1% (on Netherite and Diamond Tools) they will flash red. This pack is an "Edit" of Vanilla.

This pack is free and is only on CurseForge, PlanetMinecraft, and Modrinth. If you find it anywhere else, do not download it...


## Do not Redistribute this pack or any changes you make to it!


FAQ:

Q: Does this pack require OptiFine/CIT Resewn?

A: No, It makes use of the vanilla model files. you do not need to use either mod.

Q: Will you add more?

A: Possibly, I've been busy and have also moved away from resource packs, however, it's on the back of my mind to do armor and crossbows...
